summary: Admin Password Reset Feature - All tests passed. Backend: 7/7 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified - modal, validation, permissions.

backend: POST /api/admin/set-password/{user_id} - Admin can reset password for other users (200)
Admin cannot reset own password via this endpoint (400)
Non-admin users cannot use this endpoint (403)
Password strength validation enforced (min 10 chars, A-Z, a-z, 0-9, special)
Audit log created with admin_password_reset action
frontend: Admin can access 'Смени парола' option from user table dropdown menu
Reset password modal opens with correct user info (name + email)
Password validation - weak password rejected with browser tooltip
Password mismatch validation shows 'Паролите не съвпадат' error
New password works for login (verified via API)
Admin cannot see 'Смени парола' option for their own account
Non-admin (Technician) does NOT see 'Смени парола' option in dropdown
Audit log shows admin_password_reset with target_email and reset_by_role

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Password Reset feature is fully functional. Tech user password was reset to 'NewStrongPass123!' during testing. Backend endpoint POST /api/admin/set-password/{user_id} is working. Frontend modal has Bulgarian translations. Password validation uses HTML5 minLength=10 + backend validation. Audit logs include admin_password_reset action with target_email and reset_by_role in changes field.

feature_verification_details.password_validation: Min 10 chars, uppercase, lowercase, digit, special character
